name: Rolling Jump
author: Poki
description: In Rolling Jump it’s your goal to escape from a horde of evil creatures! With nowhere to run, the only way to go is up! Jump your way from platform to platform. You can also perform wall jumps and double jumps to gain some extra altitude. The platforms rotate, so you’ll have to pick the perfect time to jump off - but don’t wait too long! If the monsters get you from the bottom of the screen, it's game over! Gather stars and hit airships on your way up to get extra points. Can you gain the highest score and make it to space? How to play Rolling Jump? Use the mouse or spacebar to jump! Double click or press the spacebar twice to do a double jump! Who created Rolling Jump? Rolling Jump is created by Okashi Games. Play their other games on Poki: Karakuri , MicroWars , Nano War and Park Out How can I play Rolling Jump for free? You can play Rolling Jump for free on Poki. Can I play Rolling Jump on mobile devices and desktop? Rolling Jump can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
